person.name: Beatrice de Gavre

memoryArtifacts.headline: gavre D'or au lion de gueules armé, lampassé et couronné d'azur, et une bordure échancrée de sable.

burialPlace.address: Olivet, Departement de la Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Armoirie de la famille de Gavre (Alost Pays Bas) :
D'or au lion de gueules armé, lampassé et couronné d'azur, et une bordure échancrée de sable.
Devise : 
GAVRE AU CHAPELET !
Béatrice de Gavre  née à Gavre en 1259 ; Décédée en 1316
fille de  Rasse de Gavre, seigneur de Gavre
et de Béatrice de Longueval ;
Mariée en 1286, avec Guy de Laval ( - 1333), seigneur de Laval, dont
 Guy ( - 1347)
 Pierre
 Raze
 Guyon
 Jean
 Foulques
 Isabeau ( - 1322)
 Catherine
 Jeanne
Sources de la description : Rietstap, Jougla de Morenas. Armes modernes.
relevé JPR Teyssier Chalancon Mangas

zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrice de Gavre於1280年出生在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫加維時，她的父親Rasse VIII van Gavere22歲，母親Beatrix De Longueval23歲。她於1297年與Guy IX de Laval de Montmorency結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1315年7月4日在法國享年35歲，埋葬在法國麥延奧利維特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrice de Gavre于1280年出生在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫加維时，她的父亲Rasse VIII van Gavere22岁，母亲Beatrix De Longueval23岁。她于1297年与Guy IX de Laval de Montmorency结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1315年7月4日在法国享年35岁，埋葬在法国麥延奧利維特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gavre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphonse, Cecile, Chantal, Francoise, Jacques, Julien, Laurent.
French: occupational name for a blacksmith or ironworker, from a regional form of Old French fevre (see Lefevre ). Compare Farve and Faver .

variants.name: Faver
meanings: Altered form of French Favre ‘blacksmith’ or of its cognate Lefèvre (see Lefevre ). Compare Favor .
English: probably in most cases an altered form of   Feaver  , partly because between the 16th and the 18th centuries its pronunciation was sometimes identical with the word favour (see 4 below).
English: occasionally perhaps also a nickname from Middle English (Old French) favo(u)r, Middle English faver ‘help, beauty, grace, benevolence’.

variants.name: Lefevre
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Andre, Emile, Jacques, Joffre, Luc, Adrien, Antoine, Armand, Camille, Eunide, Francois, Germaine.

French and Walloon (Lefèvre): occupational name for a blacksmith or ironworker, Old French fevre, with fused masculine definite article le. One of the most common surnames in France from an early date, coined before the French word for smith, fèvre (from Latin faber ‘maker’), was replaced by forgeron. This surname was also brought to England (in the 16th century by Protestant Walloons and later reinforced by Huguenots from France). It is also established in the Flemish part of Belgium and in Haiti. See also Lefebvre , compare Faver , Lafaver , Lafever , Lefever , and Leffew .

History: This surname is listed (in the form Le Fèvre) in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America (in the form Le Fevre).

variants.name: Favret
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Jacques, Andre, Chantel, Raoul.

nameMeanings.name: Beatrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and French form of   Beatrix  , which was quite popular in England during the Middle Ages, and strongly revived in the 19th century. It is most famous as the name of Dante's beloved, and is borne by the elder (  b. 1988 ) of the Duke of York's daughters.

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrice de Gavre was born in 1280, in Gavere, East Flanders, Belgium, her father, Rasse VIII van Gavere, was 22 and her mother, Beatrix De Longueval, was 23. She married Guy IX de Laval de Montmorency in 1297. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 4 July 1315, in France, at the age of 35, and was buried in Olivet, Mayenne, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrice de Gavre est née en 1280, à Gavere, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique, son père, Rasse VIII van Gavere, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Beatrix De Longueval, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Guy IX de Laval de Montmorency en 1297. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 4 juillet 1315, à France, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterrée à Olivet, Mayenne, France.

de.Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, Fran: Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrice de Gavre 1280 in Gavere, Ostflandern, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rasse VIII van Gavere 22 und ihre Mutter Beatrix De Longueval 23. Sie hat 1297 Guy IX de Laval de Montmorency geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 4. Juli 1315 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Frankreich und wurde in Olivet, Mayenne, Frankreich begraben.

ko.Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, Fran: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 로이레-앳랜티크
ko.lifeSummary: Beatrice de Gavre(이)가 1280년 벨기에 스트-블라아더 게이버에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rasse VIII van Gavere(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrix De Longueval(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1297년 Guy IX de Laval de Montmorency(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1315년 7월 4일 프랑스에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 메이니 라이베트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrice de Gavre nasceu em 1280, em Gavere, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica, seu pai, Rasse VIII van Gavere, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Beatrix De Longueval, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Guy IX de Laval de Montmorency em 1297. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 4 de julho de 1315, em França, com 35 anos, e foi sepultada em Olivet, Mayenne, França.

ru.Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, Fran: лоире-атлантику, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrice de Gavre родилась в 1280 г. в местности гавир, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Rasse VIII van Gavere было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Beatrix De Longueval, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guy IX de Laval de Montmorency в 1297 г. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 4 июля 1315 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 35 лет и была похоронена в местности оливет, меиенн, Франция.

Se casó con Guy IX de Laval de Montmorency en 1297. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas.
